sentences.english: In the modern economy, attention has become the scarcest and most valuable resource — more precious than oil or gold.
sentences.korean: 현대 경제에서 주의력이 가장 희소하고 가치 있는 자원이 됐다 — 석유나 금보다 귀중한 자원이다.

sentences.english: Every app on your phone is engineered to capture and hold your attention for as long as possible, using techniques borrowed from behavioral psychology and gambling.
sentences.korean: / 행동 심리학과 도박에서 빌려온 기법을 사용하여.

sentences.english: The business model is straightforward — the longer you scroll, the more advertisements you see, and the more revenue the platform generates.
sentences.korean: 비즈니스 모델은 간단하다 — 오래 스크롤할수록 더 많은 광고를 보고 플랫폼은 더 많은 수익을 창출한다.

sentences.english: Some researchers warn that this constant competition for our attention is not merely annoying — it is fundamentally rewiring our brains, shortening attention spans and reducing our capacity for deep, sustained thought.
sentences.korean: / 집중 시간을 줄이고 깊은 지속적 사고 능력을 감소시키면서.
